prompts.title: Gather tax documents
prompts.desc: W-2s, 1099s, childcare receipts, mortgage interest. Get them in one folder now.

prompts.title: Book Q1 dental cleanings
prompts.desc: Schedule dental cleanings for the whole family — they book out 2 months.

prompts.title: Summer camp registration opening
prompts.desc: Popular Boston-area camps open registration in Jan-Feb. Research top 3, note registration dates. They fill fast.

prompts.title: Preschool applications due
prompts.desc: Most Boston-area preschools have Feb deadlines for next fall. Gather documents, schedule tours.

prompts.title: Snow gear still fitting?
prompts.desc: Boots, snow pants, mittens — kids grow fast. Check sizes, replace what's too small while winter stock is available.

prompts.title: Change furnace filter
prompts.desc: Every 90 days. Write the date on the new one.

prompts.title: Test smoke & CO detectors
prompts.desc: Press the test button on every detector. Replace batteries if needed.

prompts.title: Valentine's Day at school/daycare
prompts.desc: Does the school do valentines? Cards + small treats usually needed. Check with teacher.

prompts.title: February vacation week — childcare?
prompts.desc: MA school vacation is Presidents' Day week (3rd week of Feb). Do you have coverage?

prompts.title: MA excise tax bill
prompts.desc: Bills arrive in Feb, due 30 days from issuance. Don't miss it — late fees are steep.

prompts.title: Kindergarten registration opens soon
prompts.desc: Most MA districts open registration in March. Gather: birth certificate, proof of residency, immunization records.

prompts.title: Check sump pump before spring thaw
prompts.desc: Test it now before the spring melt. Pour water in the pit — it should kick on and pump it out.

prompts.title: Spring activity registration
prompts.desc: Swimming, soccer, T-ball, dance, gymnastics — registration opens now for spring sessions. Don't wait.

prompts.title: Daylight Saving — swap detector batteries
prompts.desc: Clocks spring forward. Change batteries in every smoke and CO detector.

prompts.title: Spring clothing swap coming
prompts.desc: In 3-4 weeks you'll need lighter layers, rain boots, spring jackets. Check what fits from last year, note what's needed in next size up.

prompts.title: Easter/Passover prep
prompts.desc: Outfits, plans, gifts, family gatherings. Usually late March or April.

prompts.title: Summer childcare — are all weeks covered?
prompts.desc: Map out June-August week by week. Camp sessions, vacation weeks, gaps between programs. Find coverage now.

prompts.title: Book summer travel
prompts.desc: Flight and hotel prices climb after March. If you're traveling this summer, book now for best rates.

prompts.title: Schedule winter tire removal
prompts.desc: Temps are rising. Schedule the swap for late March or early April depending on weather.

prompts.title: Tax deadline April 15
prompts.desc: File or extend. If extending, estimated payment may still be due.

prompts.title: April vacation week — childcare?
prompts.desc: MA spring school vacation is usually the 3rd week of April. Plan coverage.

prompts.title: Spring clothes swap — do it now
prompts.desc: Swap winter coats for lighter jackets. Rain boots, layers. Buy what's missing in next sizes.

prompts.title: Camp physicals needed?
prompts.desc: Many summer camps require a physical within 12 months. Schedule now so you're not scrambling in June.

prompts.title: Allergy season starting
prompts.desc: Refill kids' allergy meds. Schedule allergist if symptoms were bad last year.

prompts.title: Mother's Day coming (May)
prompts.desc: Gifts, plans, brunch reservation. Second Sunday of May.

prompts.title: Sunscreen — check expiration dates
prompts.desc: Last year's sunscreen may be expired. Restock SPF 50+ before summer markup.

prompts.title: Change furnace filter
prompts.desc: Quarterly swap. Write the date on the new one.

prompts.title: Spring gutter cleaning
prompts.desc: Clear winter debris before spring rains. Check downspouts too.

prompts.title: Storm windows out, screens in
prompts.desc: Time to swap. Check screens for holes while you're at it.

prompts.title: Turn on outdoor faucets
prompts.desc: Check for freeze damage from winter. Turn on slowly, watch for leaks.

prompts.title: Summer wardrobe — swimsuits, sandals, sun hats
prompts.desc: Buy before summer markup. Check what fits from last year.

prompts.title: Memorial Day weekend plans
prompts.desc: Unofficial start of summer. Last Monday of May. Any plans?

prompts.title: Garden planting time
prompts.desc: Last frost in Boston is ~May 15. Safe to plant after that.

prompts.title: End-of-year teacher gifts
prompts.desc: School ends mid-June. Plan gifts for teachers, aides, bus drivers. A group gift or gift card + personal note goes a long way.

prompts.title: Bike helmets still fit? Bikes right size?
prompts.desc: Kids grow. Check helmet fit (should sit level, 2 fingers above eyebrows). Check bike seat height.

prompts.title: Post the summer schedule
prompts.desc: Print or share the full June-August calendar: camps, vacations, gaps, pickup schedules. Everyone needs to see it.

prompts.title: Father's Day coming (June)
prompts.desc: Third Sunday of June. Gifts, plans.

prompts.title: End of school — last day logistics
prompts.desc: Teacher gifts, class party contributions, last-day pickup plan. Check school calendar for exact date.

prompts.title: Swim lessons starting
prompts.desc: Critical safety skill for young kids. If not enrolled, find a program now.

prompts.title: Car seat stage check
prompts.desc: Are kids at the next stage? Check height/weight limits. Rear-facing → forward-facing → booster transitions.

prompts.title: Fall activity registration opens soon
prompts.desc: Some programs open registration in summer. Soccer, swim, music, gymnastics. Watch for announcements.

prompts.title: Dryer vent cleaning
prompts.desc: Annual task. Lint buildup is a fire hazard. Schedule a cleaning.

prompts.title: Mid-summer clothing check
prompts.desc: Kids grow fast in summer. Do current clothes still fit? Buy next size for late summer/early fall.

prompts.title: School supply lists are out
prompts.desc: Lists usually released mid-July. Get ahead of the August rush — buy now.

prompts.title: Change furnace filter
prompts.desc: Quarterly swap. Write the date on the new one.

prompts.title: Kindergarten orientation events
prompts.desc: If your child starts K this fall, attend orientation. Meet the teacher, see the classroom, ease anxiety.

prompts.title: July 4th — fireworks & water safety
prompts.desc: Sunburn, dehydration, firework safety, water safety at gatherings. Reapply sunscreen every 2 hours.

prompts.title: Back-to-school shopping
prompts.desc: Clothes, shoes, backpack, lunch box, supplies from the list. Do it early August before sizes sell out.

prompts.title: Back-to-school haircuts
prompts.desc: Schedule before school starts. Barbers get booked up last two weeks of August.

prompts.title: School forms — update and submit
prompts.desc: Emergency contacts, medical forms, immunization records, photo permissions. Do it now, not the night before.

prompts.title: Adjust bedtimes for school
prompts.desc: Start moving bedtime earlier by 15 min every few days, 2 weeks before school starts.

prompts.title: Label everything
prompts.desc: Clothes, backpack, water bottle, lunch box, jacket. If it goes to school, put a name on it.

prompts.title: Schedule flu shots
prompts.desc: Available starting September. Book now for the whole family — appointments fill up.

prompts.title: Labor Day weekend plans
prompts.desc: First Monday of September. Last summer weekend. Any plans?

prompts.title: School starts — first week logistics
prompts.desc: Drop-off routine, who picks up, after-school care, emergency contacts confirmed? Walk the route if new school.

prompts.title: Get flu shots
prompts.desc: Best coverage if done in Sept-Oct, before flu season peaks. Whole family.

prompts.title: Fall activities starting
prompts.desc: Confirm schedules, carpool arrangements, gear needed. Post the weekly activity schedule.

prompts.title: Start thinking about Halloween costumes
prompts.desc: Buy or make in October before shelves empty. Ask the kids now what they want to be.

prompts.title: Thanksgiving travel — book now
prompts.desc: Flight prices jump in October. Book Thanksgiving travel now if you're flying.

prompts.title: Open enrollment coming (November)
prompts.desc: Review your current health plan. Any changes needed? Compare options before enrollment opens.

prompts.title: Schedule furnace tune-up
prompts.desc: Get the heating system checked before you need it. Book now — HVAC companies get slammed in October.

prompts.title: Winter clothing check
prompts.desc: Coats, boots, snow pants, mittens, hats — what still fits from last year? Buy now before sizes sell out.

prompts.title: Halloween prep
prompts.desc: Costumes, pumpkins, trick-or-treat route, school parade. Check school schedule for events.

prompts.title: Winter tire swap
prompts.desc: Schedule for late Oct / early Nov before the first snow catches you.

prompts.title: Car inspection — when does your sticker expire?
prompts.desc: MA annual inspection. Check the sticker. Schedule if due in the next 2 months.

prompts.title: Holiday gift planning
prompts.desc: Make lists now. Buy through November to spread the cost and avoid December rush.

prompts.title: Fall gutter cleaning
prompts.desc: After leaves finish falling (late Oct-early Nov). Clear gutters and downspouts before winter.

prompts.title: Winterize outdoor faucets & hoses
prompts.desc: Drain hoses, shut off outdoor water supply, insulate exposed pipes.

prompts.title: Store or cover patio furniture
prompts.desc: Before the first freeze. Clean, cover, or move to storage.

prompts.title: Change furnace filter
prompts.desc: Quarterly swap. Write the date on the new one.

prompts.title: Open enrollment — health insurance & FSA
prompts.desc: Review plans, make elections. Deadline is usually mid-late November. Don't let it auto-renew without checking.

prompts.title: Thanksgiving prep
prompts.desc: Travel, menu, childcare during school break (half week off). Guest list, grocery order.

prompts.title: Holiday shopping — Black Friday/Cyber Monday
prompts.desc: Big items on sale. Check your gift lists. Don't wait until December.

prompts.title: Holiday cards
prompts.desc: Design, order, address list. Get a family photo if you haven't. Send by mid-December.

prompts.title: Winter gear — final check
prompts.desc: Everyone has warm, fitting outerwear? Boots, coat, snow pants, waterproof mittens, hat.

prompts.title: Snow removal prep
prompts.desc: Shovel, salt/ice melt, snow blower ready and working? Stock up before the first storm.

prompts.title: Set up humidifier
prompts.desc: Dry winter air is hard on kids' skin and breathing. Set up humidifiers in bedrooms.

prompts.title: Fall back — check detectors
prompts.desc: Daylight saving ends. Test smoke and CO detectors, replace batteries.

prompts.title: Teacher holiday gifts
prompts.desc: Something thoughtful for teachers, aides, bus driver. Gift card + handwritten note from your kid is perfect.

prompts.title: Year-end charitable donations
prompts.desc: Must be made by Dec 31 for this year's tax deduction.

prompts.title: FSA — spend remaining balance
prompts.desc: Use it or lose it (unless you have a grace period). Schedule any remaining medical/dental/vision appointments.

prompts.title: Medical appointments before deductible resets
prompts.desc: If you've met your deductible this year, schedule any procedures before Jan 1 when it resets.

prompts.title: December vacation week — childcare
prompts.desc: MA school vacation is last week of Dec into January. Plan coverage.

prompts.title: Holiday season logistics
prompts.desc: Gift wrapping, school concerts, family gatherings, travel. Deep breath — you've got this.

prompts.title: Already thinking about next summer's camps
prompts.desc: Yes, really. Top Boston-area camps open registration in January. Start your research list now.
